summary: Iteration 42: Solomon Chat + Sunday Morning Engine + Portal Access for Admins. All critical features verified working. Backend: 14/18 tests pass (4 failures due to rate limiting affecting session tokens). Frontend: Solomon FAB, chat panel, mode toggle all working correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5/min per IP) causes session token issues during rapid test execution. Tests that reuse tokens work fine.
minor.note: Functioning as designed - not a bug

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height -1 during initial load - non-blocking

solomon_chat.Send message: PASS - Message sent and 'Solomon is thinking...' shown

sunday_morning_engine.GET /api/admin/sunday-morning/notificati: PASS - Returns 6 templates (service_starting, welcome_arrived, kids_reminder, giving_reminder, cafe_ready, post_service)
sunday_morning_engine.POST /api/portal/service-checkin: PASS - Returns success or 'Already checked in'

portal_access_for_admins.Admin/Member buttons: PASS - Both buttons present in toggle

critical_code_review_comments: SolomonChat component correctly imported and rendered in PortalLayout.jsx (line 6, 263)
Role check fix in PortalLayout.jsx (line 70) allows church_admin to access portal via Lyft dual-mode
Sunday Morning notification templates properly defined with 6 templates
Service mode endpoint correctly calculates is_service_day based on Sunday/Wednesday

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Solomon FAB, panel, mode toggle all verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified: Solomon Chat FAB and panel working in portal (data-testid=samson-fab, samson-panel), Sunday Morning Engine endpoints working (notification-templates returns 6 templates, service-mode, service-checkin, attendance-streak), Aivy (church_admin) can access /portal without redirect due to Lyft dual-mode fix, Mode toggle visible for admin users. Rate limiting (5/min) may affect rapid test execution.

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS notifications - logged to console
